name: Button visible on claude.ai
description: PromptMate button appears on claude.ai after page load
steps: Look for PromptMate button at bottom-right
expected: PromptMate button is visible at bottom-right corner

name: Button visible on chatgpt.com
description: PromptMate button appears on chatgpt.com after page load
steps: Look for PromptMate button at bottom-right
expected: PromptMate button is visible at bottom-right corner

name: Button visible on chat.deepseek.com
description: PromptMate button appears on DeepSeek after page load
steps: Look for PromptMate button at bottom-right
expected: PromptMate button is visible at bottom-right corner

name: Button visible on kimi.com
description: PromptMate button appears on Kimi after page load
steps: Wait 3 seconds for document_idle content script to load
Look for PromptMate button at bottom-right
expected: PromptMate button is visible at bottom-right corner

name: Button NOT present on unsupported sites
description: PromptMate button should not appear on sites outside the manifest
expected: No PromptMate button visible anywhere on the page

name: Panel opens on button click
description: Clicking the PromptMate button opens the side panel
expected: Panel opens showing: search bar, Tone & Format row, RECENT prompt list, + New prompt button

name: Panel closes via × button
description: Clicking the × button in the panel header closes the panel
steps: Click the × (close) button at top-right of the panel
expected: Panel closes; PromptMate button remains visible at bottom-right

name: Panel closes via PromptMate button re-click
description: Clicking the PromptMate button again while the panel is open closes it
steps: Click the PromptMate button at bottom-right
expected: Panel closes

name: Search filters by title
description: Typing in the search bar filters prompts matching the query in the title
steps: Type a term matching an existing prompt title
expected: Only matching prompts shown; header reads 'N RESULTS FOR "QUERY"'

name: Search filters by body content
description: Search also matches text in the prompt body, not just the title
preconditions: A prompt exists with known body text
steps: Type a word found only in a prompt's body
expected: That prompt appears in results

name: Search empty state
description: A query with no matches shows a clear empty state
expected: Shows '0 RESULTS FOR "XYZNOTFOUND"' and 'No prompts match "xyznotfound".'

name: Clear search via × button
description: Clicking × in the search bar resets the list
steps: Click the × (clear) button inside the search bar
expected: Search field clears; full prompt list restored

name: Search is case-insensitive
description: Search matches prompts regardless of letter case
preconditions: A prompt with a known title exists
steps: Search for the title in all lowercase
expected: Both searches return the same matching prompt

name: Section expands and collapses
description: Clicking Tone & Format toggles the section open and closed
steps: Click the Tone & Format row to expand
expected: Expands to show TONE and FORMAT dropdowns; collapses back showing summary label e.g. 'Tone: None · Format: None'

name: Tone dropdown has correct options
description: TONE dropdown contains exactly: None, Professional, Friendly, Concise, Technical
expected: 5 options visible: None, Professional, Friendly, Concise, Technical

name: Format dropdown has correct options
description: FORMAT dropdown contains exactly: None, Paragraphs, Bulleted List, Numbered Steps, Markdown Table
expected: 5 options visible: None, Paragraphs, Bulleted List, Numbered Steps, Markdown Table

name: Selection persists in collapsed summary
description: Chosen tone and format are reflected in the collapsed Tone & Format label
expected: Collapsed label reads 'Tone: Professional · Format: Bulleted List'

name: Tone & Format appended when prompt is used
description: When tone/format are set, using a prompt appends the modifier to the injected text
steps: Inspect the injected text in the chat input
expected: Injected text includes the prompt body plus a tone/format instruction appended

name: RECENT section displays prompts
description: Prompts appear under a RECENT section header in the library
expected: Prompts listed under 'RECENT' with title, body preview, Use button, and usage count (Nx)

name: Empty library state
description: When no prompts exist, an appropriate empty state is shown
preconditions: No prompts exist in the library
expected: No RECENT header with items; empty state message or illustration shown

name: PINNED section appears above RECENT when prompts are pinned
description: Pinned prompts appear in a separate PINNED section above RECENT
preconditions: At least one prompt is pinned
expected: PINNED section appears above RECENT; pinned prompts show a pin icon

name: Prompts ordered by recency in RECENT
description: Most recently used or created prompts appear first in the RECENT list
steps: Use a prompt that was previously lower in the list
Re-open the panel and observe order
expected: Used prompt moves toward the top of the RECENT list

name: Use injects prompt on claude.ai
description: Clicking Use puts the prompt body into claude.ai's chat input
expected: Prompt body text appears in the chat textarea; panel stays open

name: Use injects prompt on chatgpt.com
description: Clicking Use puts the prompt body into ChatGPT's contenteditable input
expected: Prompt body text appears in ChatGPT's input field; panel stays open

name: Use injects prompt on chat.deepseek.com
description: Clicking Use puts the prompt body into DeepSeek's input
expected: Prompt body text appears in DeepSeek's input field; panel stays open

name: Use injects prompt on kimi.com
description: Clicking Use puts the prompt body into Kimi's input
expected: Prompt body text appears in Kimi's input field; panel stays open

name: Use increments usage counter
description: Usage counter (Nx) on the prompt card increments by 1 after clicking Use
preconditions: Note current usage count on a prompt
expected: Usage counter increases by 1

name: Pin moves prompt to PINNED section
description: Pinning a prompt creates a PINNED section and moves the card there
preconditions: At least one unpinned prompt exists
expected: PINNED section appears above RECENT; prompt moves there with pin icon; menu item changes to 'Unpin'

name: Unpin returns prompt to RECENT
description: Unpinning a prompt removes it from PINNED and returns it to RECENT
preconditions: At least one prompt is pinned
steps: Open ... menu on a pinned prompt
expected: Prompt removed from PINNED (section disappears if now empty); prompt reappears in RECENT; menu item reverts to 'Pin'

name: Multiple prompts can be pinned simultaneously
description: More than one prompt can be in the PINNED section at once
expected: Both prompts appear in PINNED; RECENT shows only unpinned prompts

name: New prompt modal opens with correct fields
description: Clicking + New prompt opens a modal with TITLE and PROMPT BODY fields
expected: Modal titled 'New prompt' opens; TITLE field has placeholder 'E.g. Improve tone'; PROMPT BODY has placeholder 'Write your prompt here...'

name: Create new prompt successfully
description: Filling title and body then clicking Save creates the prompt
steps: Enter body 'This is an automated test prompt.'
expected: Modal closes; 'AutoTest-TC032' appears in RECENT list with correct body preview

name: Create prompt — Cancel discards
description: Clicking Cancel on the new prompt modal does not save
expected: Modal closes; no new prompt appears in the list

name: Create prompt — empty title is blocked
description: Cannot save a new prompt without a title
expected: Save is blocked or validation error shown; modal stays open

name: Create prompt — empty body is blocked
description: Cannot save a new prompt without a body
expected: Save is blocked or validation error shown; modal stays open

name: Edit opens modal pre-filled
description: Clicking Edit in the ... menu opens a modal pre-filled with the prompt's current values
expected: Modal titled 'Edit prompt' opens with TITLE and PROMPT BODY pre-filled with current values

name: Edit save persists changes
description: Changing title/body and saving updates the prompt card
preconditions: Edit modal open on a prompt
expected: Modal closes; prompt card shows updated title and body preview

name: Edit cancel discards changes
description: Clicking Cancel in edit modal closes it without saving
preconditions: Edit modal open with changes made
expected: Modal closes; original title and body unchanged in the list

name: Edit — empty title is blocked
description: Cannot save an edit with an empty title
expected: Save blocked or validation error; modal stays open

name: Edit — empty body is blocked
description: Cannot save an edit with an empty body
expected: Save blocked or validation error; modal stays open

name: Copy puts prompt body on clipboard
description: Clicking Copy in the ... menu copies the body text to the clipboard
expected: Pasted text exactly matches the prompt body

name: History modal opens with revision list
description: Clicking History opens a modal showing up to 10 revisions
preconditions: A prompt with at least one prior edit exists
expected: Modal 'Version history' opens; current version labeled 'Current' in green; others show 'Show changes' + 'Restore'; header reads 'Showing the 10 most recent revisions. Restoring creates a new revision.'

name: Show changes reveals diff
description: Clicking Show changes on a past revision expands a diff view
preconditions: At least one non-current revision exists
steps: Click 'Show changes' on a past revision
expected: BODY section expands showing text with additions highlighted in green; button changes to 'Hide changes'

name: Hide changes collapses diff
description: Clicking Hide changes collapses the expanded diff
expected: Diff collapses; button reverts to 'Show changes'

name: Restore creates a new revision
description: Restoring a past version adds it as the new current revision
expected: Restored content becomes 'Current'; a new revision entry is added at the top of the list

name: History capped at 10 revisions
description: At most 10 revisions are shown even if more exist
preconditions: A prompt edited more than 10 times
expected: Exactly 10 revision entries listed

name: Delete moves prompt to Trash
description: Clicking Delete in the ... menu soft-deletes the prompt
preconditions: At least one prompt exists (use AutoTest- prompt)
expected: Prompt disappears from the library list

name: Deleted prompt appears in Trash with 30-day label
description: Deleted prompt shows in Recently deleted with correct expiry label
expected: Deleted prompt listed under TRASH with 'Deleted today · expires in 30 days'

name: Restore from Trash returns prompt to library
description: Clicking Restore brings the prompt back to the RECENT list
preconditions: At least one deleted prompt exists
expected: Prompt removed from Trash; reappears in RECENT in the main library

name: Delete forever permanently removes prompt
description: Delete forever removes the prompt with no possibility of recovery
preconditions: An AutoTest- prompt is in Trash
steps: Click 'Delete forever' on an AutoTest- prompt
expected: Prompt removed from Trash; does not reappear in library

name: Navigate to Trash and back to library
description: The ... menu correctly switches between Trash and Prompt library views
expected: Trash view opens; Prompt library view restored on second click

name: Sync indicator appears after a change
description: 'Syncing...' text appears briefly at panel bottom after any data change
expected: 'Syncing...' indicator appears then disappears

name: Prompts persist after page reload
description: All prompts remain in the library after navigating away and back
expected: All prompts present after reload

name: Prompt created on one platform appears on another
description: Cloud sync makes prompts available across all supported platforms
preconditions: Logged in on both claude.ai and chatgpt.com
expected: 'AutoTest-TC054' appears in the library on chatgpt.com

name: Logged-in email is displayed
description: The authenticated user's email is shown at the bottom of the panel
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the panel
expected: User's email address is visible in the footer

name: Sign out button is present
description: A Sign out option is available in the panel footer
steps: Observe the footer area of the panel
expected: 'Sign out' link or button is visible next to the email

name: User Guide opens in a new tab
description: Clicking User Guide from ... menu opens documentation externally
expected: A new browser tab opens with the PromptMate documentation or guide page

name: Rate PromptMate link is present and clickable
description: 'Rate PromptMate' in the footer navigates to the extension's review page
steps: Click 'Rate PromptMate' in the panel footer
expected: Opens the Chrome Web Store listing or equivalent review page

name: Request a feature link is present and clickable
description: 'Request a feature' opens a feedback or feature-request page
steps: Click 'Request a feature' in the panel footer
expected: Opens a feature request form or feedback page in a new tab

name: Very long title does not break layout
description: A 100+ character title is handled gracefully in the prompt card
expected: Card layout is intact; title is truncated or wrapped without overflow

name: Very long body injects without truncation
description: A 1000+ character prompt body is injected completely into the chat input
preconditions: A prompt with 1000+ character body exists
steps: Click Use on the long-body prompt
expected: Full body text injected with no truncation

name: Prompt with special characters saves and injects correctly
description: Prompts containing quotes, emoji, HTML tags, and newlines behave correctly
steps: Create 'AutoTest-TC062' with body containing: double quotes, emoji 🚀, <script>alert(1)</script>, and a newline
expected: Prompt saves without corruption; injected text matches exactly

name: Duplicate prompt titles are allowed
description: Two prompts can share the same title and are treated as separate items
expected: Both prompts appear in the list with different body previews

name: Escape key closes modals without saving
description: Pressing Escape dismisses any open modal without saving
preconditions: A modal is open (New prompt, Edit, or History)
expected: Modal closes; no data is saved or changed
